title: Creator’s Essentials
description: Creator’s Essentials is a lightweight, performance-boosted modpack designed for content creators. It improves FPS, visuals, and quality of life while adding tools like Replay Mod, better UI, and creator utilities—all without changing vanilla gameplay.
body:
## **⭐ Creator’s Essentials — The Ultimate Modpack for Content Creators**
**Creator’s Essentials is a carefully curated Minecraft modpack built specifically for YouTubers, streamers, and content creators who want the perfect balance between performance, visual quality, and creator-focused tools—all while keeping the world close to vanilla gameplay.

Whether you're recording cinematic shots, creating survival videos, or building SMP content, this modpack gives you everything you need to produce high-quality content with zero complications.**
**_
🎥 What This Modpack Includes_**


## 🎬 1. Creator & Cinematic Tools

Perfect for creating videos, cinematic shots, or replay-style timelapses.

Replay Mod (cinematic camera, replays, timelapses)

Camera Utils (smooth shots & POV tools)

Zoom Mods like Ok Zoomer (creator-friendly zooming)

Just Enough Items (JEI) for quick item viewing

Controlling (search keybinds easily)
## 
## 🧰 2. Quality of Life Improvements

Enhance your gameplay with clean, simple improvements that stay vanilla-friendly.

Inventory sorting tools

Better tooltips & item info

Chunk borders, coordinates UI, minimap (optional)

BetterF3 (cleaner debug info for videos)

MouseTweaks (faster crafting/inventory management)

## 🎨 3. Visual Enhancements (Optional & Lightweight)
## 
Improve your game’s look without hurting performance or breaking the vanilla feel.

Simple shaders support

HUD & GUI improvements

Better animations & particles

Sound enhancement mods

## 🛡 4. Stability & Creator Safety

Nothing heavy, nothing risky — only reliable, safe, lightweight mods.

No game-changing content

No confusing mod menus

No server-breaking changes

100% survival-friendly & SMP-friendly

# 🧩 Why Content Creators Love This Pack

Perfect for YouTube SMP, Hardcore series, Build videos, Challenges, and more.

Doesn’t change core gameplay → keeps videos clean and easy for viewers.

FPS stays high while recording with OBS/ShadowPlay.

Cinematic tools built directly into the modpack.

Easy to install — optimized out of the box.

### 🔧 Recommended Specs


```
RAM: 6–8 GB allocated
CPU: any modern quad-core or better
GPU: Any card that supports shaders (optional)
```


Runs perfectly even on mid-range systems!

# 🌐 Community & Socials

📌 Discord: https://discord.gg/nqG3JjWKUX

📌 YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@Iyad_arai
